action_set_definitions.name: get_deployment_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current operational metrics for a specific Kubernetes deployment, including current replica count, CPU usage, and incoming traffic load.

deployment_name.description: The name of the deployment to query (e.g., 'optical-inspection').

action_set_definitions.name: get_cluster_constraints
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches the hard limits for scaling, such as maximum and minimum replicas allowed by the cluster quota for the given deployment.

action_set_definitions.name: update_replica_count
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a scaling action to set the number of pods for a deployment to a specific value.

deployment_name.description: The name of the deployment to scale.

replica_count.description: The target number of pods to run.

state_description.replicas: The current number of running pod instances in the deployment.
state_description.cpu_usage_percentage: The average CPU utilization percentage across all active pods.
state_description.memory_usage_mb: The average memory consumption per pod in Megabytes.
state_description.incoming_qps: Current incoming requests per second targeting the service.
state_description.max_replicas_limit: The maximum number of pods allowed by cluster quota.
state_description.min_replicas_limit: The minimum number of pods required for high availability.
